global.title: Wall St futures subdued as U.S.-Iran talks stall - KITCO
global.summary: Markets opened cautiously as U.S.-Iran talks appeared to stall, with investors watching oil prices, inflation, and the wider fallout from Middle East tensions.
global.whyItMatters: This helps frame prayer and preaching around anxiety, peacemaking, and how global conflict affects everyday households.

global.title: Overnight News Digest May 10, 2026 - Daily Kos
global.summary: A Reuters roundup reports Putin saying the Ukraine war may be nearing an end even as he again defended Russia’s narrative and floated new European security talks.
global.whyItMatters: Pastors may want to pray with both hope and discernment as war rhetoric shifts but suffering and uncertainty remain.

global.title: Netanyahu says there's still "work to be done" before Iran war ends | 60 Minutes - CBS News
global.summary: In a fresh interview, Netanyahu said the Iran war is not yet over, signaling that ceasefire language has not resolved the deeper conflict.
global.whyItMatters: This offers a current angle for intercession, pastoral sensitivity, and wise public prayer about war, peace, and civilian fear.

canadian.title: Collision leaves motorcycle hanging from traffic light in Delta, B.C. - Global News
canadian.summary: A dramatic crash in Delta left a motorcycle suspended from a traffic light, drawing attention to road safety and the fragility of ordinary life.
canadian.whyItMatters: Local tragedies often open pastoral opportunities for prayer, presence, and reminding congregations to care for neighbors in crisis.

local.title: Collision leaves motorcycle hanging from traffic light in Delta, B.C. - Global News
local.summary: A Delta collision on Sunday left a motorcycle hanging from a traffic light, a striking local incident that quickly drew public attention.
local.whyItMatters: For a B.C. pastor, this is the kind of nearby event that shapes community concern and invites practical pastoral presence.

persecutedChurch.title: Open Doors: Number of Christians persecuted worldwide rises to 388 million
persecutedChurch.summary: A Vatican News report on Open Doors says the number of Christians facing persecution worldwide has risen to 388 million.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This is a clear call to lead informed prayer, global awareness, and solidarity with suffering believers.

persecutedChurch.title: Over 30 Christians beheaded in Mozambique, churches burned
persecutedChurch.summary: MNN reports that Islamic State-affiliated militants in northern Mozambique recently killed more than 30 Christians and burned churches.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This is urgent material for congregational prayer and a reminder that many believers still worship under severe threat.

leadership.title: Two Case Studies Reveal 4 Lessons That Leadership Is About Conviction Not Survival - Forbes
leadership.summary: This piece argues that leadership is not merely enduring pressure but knowing when conviction, clarity, and health must be guarded rather than sacrificed.
leadership.whyItMatters: Helpful for a lead pastor navigating stress, courage, and the temptation to confuse faithfulness with exhaustion.

goodNews.title: Stories to make you smile from across the West Midlands - BBC
goodNews.summary: The BBC gathered several uplifting stories, including a young BMX hopeful, thriving beavers, and a generous gift to support creative work.
goodNews.whyItMatters: A gentle reminder that joy, generosity, and small signs of renewal still deserve attention in a heavy news cycle.
